message:
feat(robot,cli,serve): add dashboard alerts section, expand CLI/serve test coverage

Robot sections:
- Add GetDashboardAlertsSection(limits) for TUI dashboard display — reads
  from the global alert tracker, converts to AlertInfo structs, applies
  limits with truncation metadata, and builds AlertSummaryInfo with
  severity-bucketed counts
- Retain GetTerseProjection from prior work alongside the new alerts section

Markdown renderer:
- Expand markdown output formatting for section projection data

CLI tests (cli_test.go):
- Expand TestDepsCmdExecutes with fake tool directory setup, PATH
  injection, and JSON output validation
- Add imports for startup, status, output, and io packages used by
  new test helpers

Work tests (work_test.go):
- Add new test cases for work command execution paths

Serve parity tests (parity_test.go):
- Add 336 lines of new test coverage for robot API endpoint parity
  between HTTP and CLI surfaces, including response normalization,
  section validation, and event/state integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
